title: potentilla australis var. malyana
intro: Potentilla australis var. malyana, also known as Malayan cinquefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Potentilla australis var. malyana is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a herbal supplement or added to topical applications for its medicinal properties.
